summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Social World Panel SMM SaaS MVP. Backend APIs are fully functional with 95.5% success rate. Frontend loads correctly with cyberpunk theme, admin login works, and dashboard displays properly. Minor backend status code issue found.

minor_issues.issue: Returns HTTP 200 instead of expected 201 for order creation
minor_issues.impact: Cosmetic only - order creation works correctly

session_issues.issue: Session management may not persist properly between page navigation

loading_issues.issue: Services data loading shows spinner but may take time to load

passed_tests: Homepage loads with animated hero and stats ticker
Admin login with correct credentials (admin@kalia.com / Hanumanji22@)
Dashboard displays stats and user balance ($10,000.00)
Services page navigation and category display
All backend API endpoints (22/23 tests passed)
Public stats, categories, and services endpoints
Order creation and deposit functionality (mock payments)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix minor order creation endpoint status code (200→201) and improve session persistence for admin navigation. Consider adding loading states for services page.
